sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Toulouse have shown decent form with three wins in their last five matches, including strong away performances. RC Lens, however, are in exceptional shape, winning all seven of their most recent games, showcasing their dominance as league leaders.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In their last two encounters, matches between Toulouse and RC Lens have been tight, with one draw (1-1) and a narrow Toulouse win (1-0). Historically, Lens have the edge with 3 wins in the last 5 head-to-heads, but games tend to be low-scoring, with under 2.5 goals in 8 of the last 10.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Toulouse, sitting 8th with 23 points, have a balanced attack (24 goals) but struggle with possession (40.9%, 18th in Ligue 1). RC Lens, atop the table with 37 points, boast a potent offense (28 goals) and a tight defense (13 conceded), making them favorites.

sections.subtitle: Key Players
sections.text: For Toulouse, Aron Dønnum (7.78 average rating) and Emersonn (3 goals in last 5) are in form. RC Lens rely on Florian Thauvin (3 goals, 2 assists in last 5) and Odsonne Édouard (7 goals this season) to lead their attack.

sections.subtitle: Match Outlook
sections.text: Given Lens' superior form, league position, and attacking prowess, they are likely to control the game. Toulouse's recent resilience might keep it close, but Sofascore's prediction (47% away win) aligns with Lens having the upper hand.
